description.ko: 갈라진 압축 토양 덩어리 속 등고선 같은 퇴적층과 거친 광물이 흙과 돌의 느린 기억을 드러낸다.
description.en: A split block of compacted earth reveals contour-like sediment bands, rough minerals, and the slow memory of soil and stone.

prompt: TERRA-1, titled "The Fossil Contour Bed." A photorealistic close-range view inside a freshly split block of compacted earth, where sediment layers curl around buried pebble clusters like hand-drawn topographic contour lines. Dense #8B4513 umber clay seams, #D2691E rust-orange iron bands, and #F4A460 sandy silt lenses stack in uneven ribbons across rough stone fragments, root imprints, compressed loam, and small mica flecks. Fine #2F4F4F slate-gray mineral grains settle in shadowed pores and pressure cracks, giving the surface a grounded, slow-weathered weight. Natural raking light grazes the exposed cross-section, revealing gritty soil, brittle shale flakes, granular ridges, eroded pockets, and the quiet narrative of land built one layer at a time; hyper-detailed geological texture study in earthy tones.
